title: Humsafar
description: Humsafar is a Pakistani romantic drama television serial that aired on Hum TV from October 2011 to January 2012. It is based on the novel of the same name by Farhat Ishtiaq. The drama stars Fawad Khan and Mahira Khan and is considered one of the greatest Pakistani dramas ever made.

title: Zindagi Gulzar Hai
description: Zindagi Gulzar Hai is a Pakistani television drama serial that aired on Hum TV from November 2012 to April 2013. It is based on a novel of the same name by Umera Ahmed. The drama stars Fawad Khan and Sanam Saeed and is widely regarded as a masterpiece of Pakistani television.
